data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The requirement to validate personalization variables (name, time, provider, location, custom fields) is not met as there is no evidence provided that explicitly confirms the existence or functionality of these variables in the system. The prior steps focus on booking confirmations and customer interactions but do not address the specific need for personalization variables. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence provided regarding the requirement for personalization variables.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation or functionality of personalization variables (name, time, provider, location, custom fields).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
